news.title: AppLovin (APP) Opens AppLovin Ads To All Advertisers After Axon Rebrand
news.summary: AppLovin (NasdaqGS:APP) has rebranded its Axon advertising platform as AppLovin Ads. The company has removed referral code requirements, opening its ad technology to all advertisers globally. The shift broadens access beyond mobile gaming and is intended to support a wider range of digital ad campaigns. news.title: How Axon is replacing guns with tech
news.summary: Axon founder and CEO Rick Smith sits down with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi to explore the company's wild evolution from a scrappy garage startup into a $40 billion public safety tech empire driven by tasers, AI, and drones, all united under a moonshot mission to make the bullet obsolete.

news.title: Edgewater Research Upgrade AppLovin Corporation (APP)
news.summary: AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) is among the Best Fundamental Stocks. On June 5, Edgewater Research upgraded AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) to Outperform from Neutral. Separately, AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) announced that its advertising platform is now open to all advertisers. It has eliminated the referral code requirement introduced when its self-serve platform launched last October
